_description: Tailscale / VPN overrides — Mac Mini Ollama provider. Merge the 'ollama-mac-mini' block into your base models.json providers object.
_notes: In most Tailscale setups http://mac-mini:11434 works everywhere. Use this file only if MagicDNS short names don't resolve outside the tailnet. Replace tail12345 with your actual tailnet name from tailscale status. snowflake-arctic-embed2 (1.2 GB) is also installed for RAG embeddings but is not listed here — Pi does not route completions to it.

models.name: Qwen3 Coder 30B MoE (Mac Mini)
models._notes: Primary coder — Python, PHP, Rust, general reasoning; MoE 256K context

models.name: Qwen2.5 Coder 7B (Mac Mini)
models._notes: Fast autocomplete and FIM — sub-150-token tasks and inline completions
